tasks.title: Modularize web/src/index.css (2771 LOC) into smaller CSS files
plan: Split index.css into themed sections (base, layout, components, utilities) and import them in a stable order.
Preserve selector specificity and avoid visual regressions.
Verify by running cd web && pnpm run build and spot-checking key screens.
notes: Why it matters: monolithic CSS makes scope and overrides hard to reason about, increasing styling regressions.
Minimal fix: split CSS into smaller files with clear boundaries while keeping the cascade order.

tasks.title: Split internal/crawl/crawl.go (743 LOC) into cohesive files
plan: Extract crawler orchestration, worker logic, and utility helpers into separate files within internal/crawl.
Keep exported types/functions unchanged unless strictly necessary.
notes: Why it matters: larger files increase coupling between crawler stages and make targeted changes risky.
Minimal fix: split by responsibility without behavior changes.

tasks.title: Split internal/store/store_retention_test.go (901 LOC) into focused test files
plan: Group retention tests by feature (jobs, crawl states, artifacts) and split into multiple *_test.go files.
Extract shared helpers into a testutil file if needed.
notes: Why it matters: oversized test files are difficult to maintain and make failures harder to triage.
Minimal fix: split by responsibility while keeping assertions intact.

tasks.title: Split internal/webhook/dispatcher_test.go (803 LOC) into focused test files
plan: Separate dispatcher tests by scenario (success, retries, failures, rate limits) into multiple files.
Keep shared fixtures in a local test helper file.
notes: Why it matters: large test files increase cognitive load and complicate adding coverage.
Minimal fix: split tests into cohesive files without altering behavior.
